channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Oregon, Penn State amass 55 points to set Big Ten title game 1st-half scoring record
item.description: Oregon and Penn State piled up seven touchdowns, 537 yards, 28 first downs and 55 points in the Big Ten title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Wizards overcome career-high 56 by Jokic, snap 16-game skid with 122-113 win over the Nuggets
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jordan Poole scored 39 points, and the Washington Wizards overcame a career-high 56 by Nikola Jokic to beat the Denver Nuggets 122-113 on Saturday night and snap their 16-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Archie Manning reveals preferred NFL landing spot for grandson, Texas star Arch Manning
item.description: Arch Manning was one of the most highly touted recruits in recent history. He can't enter next year's NFL Draft, but all eyes will be on him when he does make the leap to the pros.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trevor Lawrence's teammate fined for attacking Azeez Al-Shaair after illegal hit
item.description: The NFL fined Jacksonville Jaguars tight end Evan Engram $11,255 for unnecessary roughness in response to an illegal hit on quarterback Trevor Lawrence.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Willy Adames agrees to $182 million, 7-year deal with the Giants, AP source says
item.description: Willy Adames has agreed to a $182 million, seven-year contract with San Francisco, providing the Giants with a power-hitting shortstop in the prime of his career, according to a person familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Georgia QB Carson Beck returns from hand injury for final snap in SEC championship OT win over Texas
item.description: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck, believed to be out for the remainder of the game with a hand injury, returned for the final snap in the Bulldogs’ 22-19 overtime victory over Texas in the Southeastern Conference championship game.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Big 12's Yormark brings up hard choices for fans before sparsely attended title game
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — A little more than an hour before the Big 12 championship game kicked off in front of thousands of empty seats at the home of the Dallas Cowboys, Commissioner Brett Yormark brought up the conundrum faced by fans with the expanded postseason format.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Heisman hopeful Ashton Jeanty points to his faith after playoff-bound Boise State wins Mountain West title
item.description: Boise State star Ashton Jeanty spoke about his faith after the Broncos secured their place in the College Football Playoffs with a win over UNLV in the Mountain West tile game on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kentucky bettor places $3.1 million wager on Eagles to beat improving Panthers
item.description: A Kentucky bettor has placed a massive wager on the Philadelphia Eagles to beat the Carolina Panthers, who are on the rise after back-to-back three-point losses.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Golden State Valkyries build roster by taking 11 players in expansion draft, including Kate Martin
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Once general manager Ohemaa Nyanin and her Golden State Valkyries staff had decided who to pick in the WNBA expansion draft, the first challenge became reaching each player with the news before she heard it anywhere else.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 24 Army wins AAC championship in first attempt as Daily runs for 4 TDs in 35-14 win over Tulane
item.description: WEST POINT, N.Y. (AP) — The first conference championship celebration in Army history was underway at midfield and Bryson Daily made clear it would be a brief one. The Black Knights are going after another trophy next week. “Beat Navy,” Daily said.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scores: 2024 CIF State Regional Playoffs
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGET) -- All eyes will be focused on the Frontier Titans football program as they host the Murrieta Mesa Rams Friday night and the Bakersfield Christian Eagles on Saturday, when they make the trip to Torrance Saturday evening.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Eyraud, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jacob Trouba isn't pleased with the Rangers' handling of his departure in a trade with Anaheim
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Jacob Trouba is finally out of New York after months of public trade rumors and private threats from the Rangers, who were determined to get rid of their captain and his massive contract.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pitcher Clay Holmes agrees to $38 million, 3-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Clay Holmes and the New York Mets have agreed to a $38 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLS Cup championship sold out as Los Angeles Galaxy shoot for 6th title
item.description: It will be a packed crowd Saturday when the Los Angeles Galaxy attempt to capture their league-record sixth MLS Cup. The Galaxy will face off with the New York Red Bulls at Dignity Health Sports Park at 1 p.m., and team officials said tickets have sold out.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Scottie Scheffler goes on a run of birdies in the Bahamas and leads by 2
item.description: NASSAU, Bahamas (AP) — Scottie Scheffler birdied every hole but the par 3s on the front nine at Albany Golf Club on Friday and finished his bogey-free round with an 8-under 64 that gave him a two-shot lead in the Hero World Challenge. Two months off did nothing to slow the world's No. 1 player.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dosunmu's first career triple-double leads Bulls 139-124 over Spurs
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Nikola Vucevic had a season-high 39 points, Ayo Dosunmu had 27 points, 11 assists and 10 rebounds and the Chicago Bulls beat the San Antonio Spurs 139-124 on Thursday night with Victor Wembanyama sidelined with a back injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah hires Jason Beck as offensive coordinator
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - While Kyle Whittingham's future is still undecided, another former BYU player is joining the Utes coaching staff. Former BYU quarterback Jason Beck is expected to be hired as Utah's new offensive coordinator, replacing Andy Ludwig, who resigned in October.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NHL to host free outdoor fan festival ahead of Winter Classic in Chicago
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The National Hockey League announced they will be hosting a free outdoor fan festival ahead of the Winter Classic in Chicago. The fan festival will begin at 10:30 a.m. on Tuesday, Dec. 31, in the Chicago Cubs parking lot at 1126 West Grace Street and run until 3:30 p.m. CT.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bucs look to slow down Raiders' star edge rusher Maxx Crosby
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — The Bucs offensive line has done a solid job in protecting quarterback Baker Mayfield this season, but they're going to have their hands full this weekend when they face off against the Raiders. Las Vegas features one of the top pass rushers in the NFL in Maxx Crosby.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Flames honor Johnny Gaudreau, welcome his family back to Calgary in emotional pre-game tribute
item.description: The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Trent Williams' wife annouces passing of newborn son
item.description: (KRON) -- San Francisco 49ers star left tackle Trent Williams' newborn son passed away last week, his wife Sondra announced on Instagram. Trenton O'Brien Williams Jr. died on the night of Nov. 24. Trenton was born prematurely as Sondra gave birth to her son after 35 weeks of pregnancy.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Ryan Poles to remain Bears general manager and lead search for new head coach
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — While his first head coaching hire is now out, Ryan Poles is still the general manager of the Chicago Bears — for now.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jaxson Stauber shuts out Vegas in season debut, 6-0
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Jaxson Stauber made 29 saves for his first NHL shutout, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vegas Golden Knights 6-0 at T-Mobile Arena on Saturday. It was Stauber’s debut for Utah, his seventh NHL game and his first since Feb. 22, 2023, with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
